note: Curated manga/comic/light-novel/ebook source candidates for Opal. Same rules as torrent-sources.json: not in the live manifest; each needs a matching app engine (or fits an existing one — see `engine`). Deduped against sources Opal already handles: MangaDex (hardcoded keyless), Nyaa (torrent), and the existing readallcomics / heancms / mangathemesia / madara / novels scrapers. Source: FMHY reading list.

manga.name: MangaFire
manga.notes: Popular manga aggregator, custom layout (not madara/themesia). High-value target.

manga.name: MangaNato
manga.notes: Manganelo/Natomanga lineage; check if the existing madara engine fits via a base override before writing a new one.

manga.name: Mangago
manga.notes: Large long-running manga reader. 403 from CI (Cloudflare). everythingmoe + awesome-piracy.

comics.name: GetComics
comics.notes: Comics DDL (CBR/CBZ links). Different shape from readallcomics (reader) — this is a download index.

comics.name: ComicBookPlus
comics.notes: PUBLIC-DOMAIN / golden-age comics only — legal, safe to prioritize.

lightnovel.name: Royal Road
lightnovel.notes: Original/self-published web serials — LEGAL user-posted content. Best novels candidate; author-permitted.

ebook_libraries.name: Anna's Archive
ebook_libraries.api: search + metadata; download often via external mirrors
ebook_libraries.notes: Meta-search over LibGen/Z-Lib/etc. Domain churns (.gl/.se/.org). Broad ebook+comics+manga coverage.

ebook_libraries.name: Library Genesis
ebook_libraries.engine: needs:adapter (OPDS mirror may fit existing opds engine)
ebook_libraries.notes: Check LibGen OPDS mirror — Opal already has an OPDS engine, so this could be near-free to wire.
